name: schedule_reminder
description: Create a reminder that triggers at a specified time.
description_for_agent: Create a scheduled reminder that will trigger a notification at a specified time. Parameters: title (string, required — reminder title), message (string, required — reminder message), trigger_at (string, required — ISO datetime like '2024-03-15T14:00:00' or relative like '+1h', '+30m', '+2d'), recurring (boolean, optional — repeat on the same schedule, default false). Use this when the user asks to be reminded about something.

trigger_at.description: When to trigger: ISO datetime or relative (+1h, +30m, +2d)
